name: Atlas Evolution
description: Thin OpenClaw export, spool, and transport bridge for Atlas Evolution runtime events and operator-session artifacts.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Plugin-local switch for Atlas Evolution export and support capture surfaces.

baseUrl.label: Atlas Base URL
baseUrl.help: Atlas Evolution local HTTP base URL. Runtime-event payloads post to /v1/ingest when this is set.

apiKey.label: Atlas API Key
apiKey.help: Optional bearer/API-key header added to plugin HTTP exports and Atlas POST attempts.

spoolDir.label: Spool Directory
spoolDir.help: Directory for append-only JSONL export ledgers and delivery-attempt logs.

retry.label: Retry Settings
retry.help: Deterministic retry policy for optional POST delivery to Atlas Evolution.

includeTranscript.label: Include Transcript
includeTranscript.help: When false, support capture stores hashes/lengths instead of raw text bodies.

includeToolCalls.label: Include Tool Calls
includeToolCalls.help: Default is summary-only. Full tool-result persistence is opt-in.
